saktu m. pl. [saṃj-tun kicca] The flour of barley first fried and then ground, barley-meal; bhikṣāsaktubhireva saṃprati vayaṃ vṛttiṃ samīhāmahe  Bh. 2. 64.

— phalā-lī the Śamī tree.
